context: Tests whether the agent uses the Python ElevenLabs SDK correctly — proper import, correct method call, valid parameter ranges for duration and prompt_influence, use of output_format, and environment variable authentication.

checklist.name: Correct Python import
checklist.description: Imports ElevenLabs from elevenlabs (Python package, not JS)

checklist.name: Correct Python method
checklist.description: Calls client.text_to_sound_effects.convert() to generate each sound effect

checklist.name: output_format parameter used
checklist.description: At least one call passes an output_format parameter to specify the audio encoding

checklist.name: Valid output_format value
checklist.description: All output_format values used are from the valid list (e.g. mp3_44100_128, pcm_44100, opus_48000_128, ulaw_8000, etc.)

checklist.name: duration_seconds specified
checklist.description: At least one call specifies a duration_seconds value

checklist.name: Valid duration range
checklist.description: All duration_seconds values are between 0.5 and 30 (inclusive)

checklist.name: prompt_influence used
checklist.description: At least one call specifies a prompt_influence value

checklist.name: Valid prompt_influence range
checklist.description: All prompt_influence values are between 0 and 1 (inclusive)

checklist.name: Environment variable auth
checklist.description: Uses ELEVENLABS_API_KEY environment variable — does NOT hardcode an API key string in the code

checklist.name: Audio written to file
checklist.description: Output audio bytes are written to files on disk (not just printed or discarded)
